phaseGoal: 为 v0.2.0 Context OS 增加 lightweight repo map，让 context packet 能携带代码结构、入口、测试位置和当前变更线索。
deliverable: Repo Map v1 schema, runtime builder, fs persistence, and Context Packet relevant-files integration
inScope: runtime repo map builder from package manifests and directory signals
git status changed-files capture with honest unknown fallback
Context Packet relevantFiles enrichment from repo map
targeted tests for normal and degraded repo map scenarios
stopCondition: Repo Map v1 can be generated from a local project, persisted to .threadsmith/context/repo-map.json, and used by Context Packet relevantFiles without embedding/RAG.
